title: New URL for API & Apps Docs

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all!

We have some exciting documentation news today

We are moving our documentation to be hosted on developer.monday.com. ﻿This change will provide you with a more unified experience when navigating and searching through our API and App Framework documentation.

After September 17th, the old URLs (api.developer.monday.com and apps.developer.monday.com) will no longer work.

Be sure to update your bookmarks accordingly.

If you see any broken links, please let us know at appsupport@monday.com!

Happy building
